name: restaurant finance teams processing 10–50 invoices/month tool
description: For restaurant finance teams processing 10–50 invoices/month, manual accounting causes cash flow gaps. We automate accounting instead of manual bookkeeping and spreadsheets.
problem_solved: manual accounting processes lead to cash flow gaps
